PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1Transformer.cc
1 #include "PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1Transformer.h"
2 /* Author : dechaiss at Wed Jan 27 13:37:39 2010

5 
6 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
7 
8 IFunctionR1vR1*
9 PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1Transformer::
10 createTransformedIFunction(const IFunctionR1vR1* const original_ifunction) const
11 {
13  const IPieceWiseFunction* original_ipiecewisefunction =
14  dynamic_cast<const IPieceWiseFunction*> (original_ifunction);
15 
17  PieceWiseFunctionType original_type;
18  original_ipiecewisefunction->getPieceWiseFunctionType(original_type);
19 
21  switch (original_type.m_interpolator_type)
22  {
23  case PieceWiseFunctionType::LinearInterpolator:
24  return createTransformedIPieceWiseFunctionT<
25  LinearInterpolator> (dynamic_cast<const PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<
26  LinearInterpolator>&> (*original_ipiecewisefunction));
27  break;
28  case PieceWiseFunctionType::LogLinearInterpolator:
29  return createTransformedIPieceWiseFunctionT<
30  LogLinearInterpolator> (dynamic_cast<const PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<
31  LogLinearInterpolator>&> (*original_ipiecewisefunction));
32  break;
33  case PieceWiseFunctionType::ConstantInterpolator:
34  return createTransformedIPieceWiseFunctionT<
35  ConstantInterpolator> (dynamic_cast<const PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<
36  ConstantInterpolator>&> (*original_ipiecewisefunction));
37  break;
38  case PieceWiseFunctionType::AndradeInterpolator:
39  return createTransformedIPieceWiseFunctionT<
40  AndradeInterpolator> (dynamic_cast<const PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<
41  AndradeInterpolator>&> (*original_ipiecewisefunction));
42  default:
43  return NULL;
44  }
45 }
46 
47 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
48 
49 template<typename T>
50 PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<T>*
51 PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1Transformer::
52 createTransformedIPieceWiseFunctionT(const PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<T>& original_ipiecewisefunction) const
53 {
55  switch (m_transformation_type)
56  {
58  case TransformationType::Clone:
59  return cloneT(original_ipiecewisefunction);
61  case TransformationType::ShiftRescale:
62  return shiftRescaleT(original_ipiecewisefunction);
63  default:
64  return NULL;
65  }
66 }
67 
68 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
69 
70 template<typename T>
71 PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<T>*
72 PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1Transformer::
73 cloneT(const PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<T>& original_ipiecewisefunction) const
74 {
76  PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<T>* new_piecewisefunction =
77  new PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<T> (m_trace_mng);
79  new_piecewisefunction->clone(original_ipiecewisefunction);
80 
81  return new_piecewisefunction;
82 }
83 
84 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
85 
86 template<typename T>
87 PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<T>*
88 PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1Transformer::
89 shiftRescaleT(const PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<T>& original_ipiecewisefunction) const
90 {
92  PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<T>* new_piecewisefunction =
93  new PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<T> (m_trace_mng);
95  new_piecewisefunction->clone(original_ipiecewisefunction);
97  new_piecewisefunction->shiftRescale(m_new_xmin, m_new_xmax, m_new_ymin, m_new_ymax);
98 
99  return new_piecewisefunction;
100 }
101
